summary: Full e2e testing of InkBook MVP - all major flows tested. Backend 17/17 tests pass. Frontend all critical flows working.

issues: i18n partial translation: heading says 'Your Perfect Tattoo wartet.' - 'wartet' is German (should be 'awaits' in English). The second line of h1 is not translated.

action_items: Fix EN translation for landing page hero h1 - second line 'wartet.' should be 'awaits.' in EN locale
critical_code_review_comments: CORS allows '*' alongside credentials which may cause issues in strict browsers - allow_origins has both explicit URL and '*'
studioowner@inkbook.com was not pre-seeded (only admin and customer were), test credentials doc mentions it but account didn't exist - should be seeded on startup

test_credentials.studio_owner: studioowner@inkbook.com / studio123 (created during testing, not pre-seeded)

seed_data_creation: Created studioowner@inkbook.com account via /api/auth/register during testing (role: studio_owner)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs are working correctly. Landing page, search, studio details, booking flow, login, register, customer dashboard, studio dashboard, AI advisor all working. Only minor issue is EN translation for hero heading second line ('wartet' instead of 'awaits'). Studio owner account was not pre-seeded - created during testing. Demo studios studio_demo001-004 are properly seeded with slots.
